name: Overlay
description: Transparent-background overlay for compositing on top of video or images. Text is positioned within the shorts-safe zone, avoiding platform UI on all edges.
author: slide-cli

slots.label: Headline
slots.description: Main heading text. 1–8 words. Positioned in the vertical safe zone.

slots.label: Eyebrow label
slots.description: Short uppercase tag above the headline (e.g. 'EPISODE 04', 'TIP', 'BREAKING').

slots.label: Caption
slots.description: Supporting line below the headline. 1–2 short sentences or an attribution.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Color for the eyebrow label and decorative rule. Vary per slide for visual interest.

slots.label: Text color
slots.description: Primary text color for headline and caption. White for dark video, dark for light video. Keep consistent across slides.

slots.label: Text shadow strength
slots.description: Opacity of text shadows (0–1). Increase for bright/busy backgrounds, decrease for dark ones.
